title: poa foliosa
intro: Poa foliosa, also known as leafy meadow-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Poa foliosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Poa foliosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried roots and leaves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
